name: Agora Tysons

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current official Agora Tysons dinner, lunch, and brunch PDFs linked from the Tysons menu hub.
All six PDF pages were rendered and visually reviewed, establishing 83 current products or distinct meal-period formulations across 18 real sections.
Seven frozen rows are headings or shifted description/dietary-label fragments. The correction restores the omitted current menu and keeps location-specific brunch names.
Agora Tysons publishes descriptions and GF, DF, and NF labels but no complete allergen matrix, complete recipes, or cross-contact policy.
Positive fields use fixed published ingredients and mandatory named formats; negative dietary labels are not promoted into comprehensive allergen-free claims.
Eighteen of 47 applicable frozen rows mismatch: ten underreported, three overreported, three mixed, and two collapsed meal-period formulations.
Oyster mushrooms do not produce shellfish, eggplant does not produce egg, and the general raw-food warning is not assigned to items.
The frozen parser interleaved multi-column PDF text, promoted headings and descriptions, flattened sections, and attached adjacent allergens to unrelated products.
The correction uses rendered layout as the authority for section and description association and reuses shared Agora formulations only after independent Tysons page comparison.
Location-specific Lamb Shoulder and Sis Tavuk brunch identities are preserved separately from dinner formulations.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Confirmed the Tysons identity and current dinner, lunch, and brunch links.
Rendered and visually reviewed both current dinner pages.
Rendered and visually reviewed both current lunch pages; the hub now links this July menu rather than the older frozen June URL.
Rendered and visually reviewed the current Tysons brunch menu and its location-specific names.
Found descriptions and dietary labels but no complete allergen matrix, recipes, or cross-contact policy.

findings.summary: The frozen 54-row catalog promoted seven headings or shifted fragments, omitted current products, and flattened real meal-period sections.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 83 current products/formulations across 18 visually verified Tysons sections and removed all artifacts.

findings.summary: Eighteen applicable frozen rows disagree with current official descriptions, including shellfish falsely assigned from oyster mushrooms or adjacent warning text.
findings.resolution: Recomputed source-bounded signals per formulation and retained 15 current rows as unavailable where positive evidence is insufficient.

findings.summary: The frozen merge lost meal-period section ownership and produced three competing Sis Tavuk fragments instead of the two real formulations.
findings.resolution: Preserved the real dinner Şiş Tavuk and brunch Sis Tavuk formulations, removed the merged fragment, and retained the Tysons-specific brunch Lamb Shoulder name.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested an 83-product/formulation Agora Tysons catalog across 18 official sections with 68 positive rows, 15 unavailable rows, and location-aware meal-period identities.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/agora-tysons-repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 83 items, 18 categories, 68 positive rows, 15 unavailable rows, artifacts excluded, and Tysons variants retained)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 83 products/formulations, 18 categories, 68 positive rows, and 15 unavailable rows.
Rendered-layout review governed all section and description associations because plain PDF extraction interleaves columns.
